scenarios.name: Broadband Saturation
scenarios.technical_details: White noise injection across 2.4GHz ISM band using high-gain directional array simulation.

scenarios.name: GNSS Meaconing
scenarios.technical_details: Delayed rebroadcast of genuine GNSS signals to induce 100m+ positional drift.

scenarios.name: MAVLink Injection
scenarios.technical_details: Crafting unauthenticated MAV_CMD_DO_SET_MODE and MAV_CMD_COMPONENT_ARM_DISARM packets.

scenarios.name: Emergency Terminal
scenarios.technical_details: Injection of MAV_CMD_DO_FLIGHT_TERMINATION (ID: 400) to force immediate motor kill in mid-air.

scenarios.name: Thermal Overload
scenarios.technical_details: Simulated telemetry flooding of SYS_STATUS packets to induce failsafe-level CPU temperatures.

scenarios.name: RTL_Explode Protocol
scenarios.technical_details: Forcing MAV_CMD_NAV_RETURN_TO_LAUNCH followed by an proximity-based payload trigger simulation.

alerts.description: Noise floor elevation > 20dB detected on control link.
Mismatch between GNSS coordinates and IMU-derived dead reckoning.
Remote disarm command injected via secondary link.

guardrails.name: Faraday Containment
guardrails.description: Simulation active only within virtual shielded environment.

guardrails.name: Legal Perimeter
guardrails.description: Automatic shutdown if live transmission detected outside laboratory bounds.
